labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Two Truths and a Twist" is a trivia game that challenges players to identify the false statement among two truths. It leverages AI to create interactive and entertaining gameplay, with tools designed to generate, submit, and reveal game rounds in a fun and engaging way. The core functionality revolves around creating playful interactions, managing game rounds, and providing statistics.
labels.reasoning: The primary functionality aligns with "Gaming" due to its focus on interactive game mechanics and entertainment. The secondary label "AI/ML Tools" is appropriate because the AI powers the unique generation of playful twists. No custom label is needed as the predefined categories cover the server's functionality well.

tools.name: create_round
tools.description: Create a new game round with a question and three statements. The twist should be playful, surprising, and entertaining - not just factually incorrect.

question.description: The main question for the round

trivia_1.description: First statement - can be truth or twist

trivia_2.description: Second statement - can be truth or twist

trivia_3.description: Third statement - can be truth or twist

tools.name: submit_guess
tools.description: Submit a player's guess for which statement is the twist

guess_index.description: Index of the guessed statement (0, 1, or 2)

tools.name: reveal_twist
tools.description: Reveal which statement was the twist and provide explanations. The explanations should be entertaining and playful - build anticipation and make the reveal fun!

twist_index.description: Index of the twist statement (0, 1, or 2)

explanation_1.description: Explanation for statement 1 - be creative and entertaining

explanation_2.description: Explanation for statement 2 - be creative and entertaining

explanation_3.description: Explanation for statement 3 - be creative and entertaining

tools.name: get_round
tools.description: Get details of a specific round

round_id.description: The ID of the round to retrieve

tools.name: get_last_round
tools.description: Get details of the most recent round

server_info_crawled.name: Two Truths and a Twist
server_info_crawled.overview: Engage in a fun trivia game where you identify the false statement among two truths. Experience interactive gameplay powered by AI, making each round unique and entertaining. Connect your MCP-compatible LLM to enjoy a seamless gaming experience.
